untranslatable_reason: The pattern requires detection of non-horizontal trend lines with specific touch counts (2+ touches on upper and lower lines), which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. Trend line slope, angle measurement, and touch point counting require candlestick-level pattern recognition beyond the scope of single-bar indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Approximated entry conditions using increasing volume (vol comparison) and upward breakout (price above prior high). Actual pattern detection requires visual/algorithmic identification of broadening formation geometry with non-horizontal trend lines and multiple touches, which is not translatable to simple indicator rules. Exit uses mean reversion to SMA_20 as reasonable reversal condition since author provided no exit guidance.
